Overview

About This Book

The AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02) is the entry point to the AWS certification path and one of the most in-demand credentials in tech. Maxwell Pepper's AWS Cloud Practitioner Study Guide teaches the entire CLF-C02 curriculum through the Kingdom of Nebulora — a fictional world where every AWS service has a role in a living kingdom. Cloudlet must master the kingdom's systems to save it. You learn cloud computing by watching it happen in a story.

What This Guide Covers

  1. Cloud Concepts (26% of exam)
  2. Security & Compliance (25% of exam)
  3. Cloud Technology & Services (33% of exam)
  4. Billing, Pricing & Support (16% of exam)
Get It on Amazon ↗
Topics

What's Covered

Cloud Concepts (26% of exam)

What cloud computing is, the six advantages of cloud, the three deployment models, and AWS global infrastructure.

Security & Compliance (25% of exam)

The AWS Shared Responsibility Model, IAM, encryption, compliance programs, and core AWS security services.

Cloud Technology & Services (33% of exam)

The largest domain: EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, VPC, CloudFront, Route 53, and 20+ other core AWS services.

Billing, Pricing & Support (16% of exam)

AWS pricing models, Total Cost of Ownership, AWS Organizations, Cost Explorer, and support plan selection.

Is This For You?

Who This Book Helps

  • ✓Non-technical professionals entering cloud roles who need an AWS foundation
  • ✓IT professionals and developers starting their AWS certification journey
  • ✓Students and career changers building toward Solutions Architect or Developer certifications
  • ✓Anyone who has struggled with other AWS prep materials and wants a more memorable approach

Why This Book Is Different

AWS certification materials are notorious for being dense and jargon-heavy. The Kingdom of Nebulora maps every AWS service to a tangible real-world analogy. EC2 instances become the kingdom's workshops. S3 becomes its vaults. IAM becomes its gates and guards. Once you see cloud through this lens, the concepts become intuitive instead of abstract.

Ready to Get Started?

Available now on Amazon in paperback and Kindle format.

Buy on Amazon ↗
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

How many questions are on the AWS Cloud Practitioner exam?
The CLF-C02 exam contains 65 questions (multiple choice and multiple response). You have 90 minutes and need a scaled score of 700 out of 1000 to pass.
How hard is the AWS Cloud Practitioner exam?
Pass rate is around 70-75% for prepared candidates. It is the easiest AWS certification, but the breadth of services covered in the CLF-C02 update catches many candidates off guard.
How long should I study for the AWS Cloud Practitioner?
Most candidates without cloud experience need 4-6 weeks at 1 hour per day. The story format compresses the timeline for many readers.
Is this updated for CLF-C02 specifically?
Yes. This guide is built specifically for the CLF-C02 exam specification, which differs from the older CLF-C01 in its heavier emphasis on specific service knowledge.
Are 2 full practice exams included?
Yes. Two complete 65-question practice exams are included with detailed explanations for every answer, designed to match the difficulty and style of the real AWS exam.
Do I need AWS experience to use this guide?
No prior AWS experience is required. The guide starts from zero and builds from first principles.
